description: Interactive chat SLO for Llama-3.1-8B on the baseline topology. Model-level targets are declared ONLY from measurement (schema-enforced: every objective's provenance.basis is 'measured'). This is the SLO the benchmark-result example's goodput block references (slo-chat-interactive @ 0.1.0).

provenance.source: baseline calibration run set run-2026-07-08-chatshort-vllm-a10g-cal (pooled p95 0.42 at 8 rps; threshold set at measured p95 + headroom)
baseline calibration run set run-2026-07-08-chatshort-vllm-a10g-cal (pooled p99 0.11)
baseline calibration run set run-2026-07-08-chatshort-vllm-a10g-cal (per-request max stall p99 0.86)

objectives.notes: per-request stall bound; the goodput-critique rule reports stall rate adjacent to goodput in every result

provenance.source: baseline calibration run set run-2026-07-08-chatshort-vllm-a10g-cal (pooled p95 9.3)
